inputs.label: Weight Lifted
inputs.businessContext: The weight you lifted for the given number of repetitions.

inputs.label: Repetitions Performed
inputs.businessContext: The number of repetitions you completed with the given weight.

inputs.label: Reps in Reserve (RIR)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated repetitions you had left in the tank before failure. 0 means you trained to failure, 1 means you could have done 1 more rep, etc.

inputs.label: Fatigue Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated performance reduction due to fatigue from previous sets, as a percentage of maximum capacity. 0% means fully fresh.
